class.name: SkaldNotification
class.description: Emitted when the script mutates a variable, letting the host observe state changes. Read the values, then advance with [method SkaldEngine.act] or [method SkaldEngine.advance]. .var_name: string .scope: string .value: Variant .has_value() -> bool

members.member: The name of the variable that was mutated.
The scope of the mutated variable: [code]global[/code], [code]module[/code], or [code]local[/code].
The resolved new value of the variable, or [code]null[/code] if none was produced.

method.name: has_value
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a resolved value is present.
